intent: Single-screen KFZ-Vollkasko damage report with a repeating involved-parties group of three rows plus police, injuries, sketch upload, appraiser appointment and a truthful-statement gate.
notes: Tier-2 insurance baseline (repeating row group + conditional requiredness): exercises a 3-row repeating involved-parties group whose first row carries Required validations and rows two and three carry only when-provided format checks. Adds two semanticKind hints (textarea on Schadenbeschreibung, file_upload on Unfallskizze) plus three RADIO_OPTION gates (police, injuries, truthful-statement). Polizei-Aktenzeichen is conditionally Required on Polizei-Aufnahme=Yes; Gutachtertermin is optional but date-bounded. Used to anchor repeating-row test-case enumeration on damage-report archetypes.
